violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Lower door at chicken table is gapped open/has loose gasket.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust at top surface of server soda dispenser. -Minimal residue at make line table top (COS-employee wiped down immediately). -Crumb debris below cutting board at raw chicken table. -Some splatter at drawer fronts of freezer below flat top. -Heavy splatter at interior of back prep area microwave.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Front hand sink does not currently have hot water available (according to employee, something needs to be replaced).

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris/residue at floor and drain below high temp dishwasher. -Floor debris/residue at corner below 3 comp sink. -Dust/debris at backroom ceiling vent.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Caulking at backsplash of 3 comp sink is stained/damaged due for replacement.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
